allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''Spheria_Wiki.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''JSON is valid''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''JSON ERROR:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''c:/Users/jeff/OneDrive/Projects/Code/Websites/SpheriaWiki.info/Spheria_Wiki.json''\); console.log\(''human count:'', d.characters.human.length\); console.log\(''polyan count:'', d.characters.polyan.length\); console.log\(''human names:'', d.characters.human.map\(c=>c.name\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''polyan names:'', d.characters.polyan.map\(c=>c.name\).join\('', ''\)\);")
